'''Natto Rice''' is a delicious food item that fills up 4 hunger points and gives your dog [[Natto Bite]] effect for 5 minutes.{{Item
| image = Natto rice.png
| id = natto_rice
| type = Food
| Subtype = Rice, Soy
| Properties = Hunger points: 4/10
Dog - Natto Bite: 5 minutes
| stackable = 64
| Description = Best way to enjoy Natto!
}}

Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|[[Natto]]+ [[Rice Bowl]]
|[[File:Natto rice crafting.png]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
